name: BYBON Group Company Limited
summary: BYBON Group Company Limited provides mobile phone aftersales services. The company operates through Mobile Phone Maintenance; Commercial Product Sales, Value-Added Services and Others; and E-commerce segments. It also sells computers, software and auxiliary equipment, electronic products, hardware, machinery; and power transmission and communications equipment. In addition, the company offers communications equipment maintenance; technology extension, computer systems, and mobile phone repair services; and mobile security, member, testing, value-added, and other related mobile services. Further, it is involved in the sale, certification, and recycling of second-hand mobiles and merchandises. The company serves mobile phone manufacturers, business customers, dealers, cooperation stores, shopping malls, individual consumers, and second-hand mobile phone business customers. It sells its products through stores and e-commerce; and operates through 139 branches. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Beijing, China. BYBON Group Company Limited is a subsidiary of Shanghai Bybon Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
